title: Step S-SWQT-0007: 组件质量矩阵与静态主题门禁

items.statement: 建立核心交互组件的真实浏览器质量矩阵、代表性 data-dense 表格证据和完整静态主题契约门禁。

inScope: 扩展示例夹具以渲染 Button、Input、Select、主题菜单和真实 DataTable。
以 Playwright projects 覆盖 light/dark 与 compact、data-dense、lg、xl 视口，保留 Chromium 截图基线。
对每个主题/视口运行 axe，并断言 820/821px 的真实表格 gate。
扩展静态脚本以检查 token 定义、alias 循环和绕过主题选择器的分支。
outOfScope: 私有 registry 发布与认证。
新的组件 API 或产品页面布局。

items.researchEvidence: R-SWUI-001 §5、§7、§8；Playwright v1.61 官方 projects/colorScheme 文档。
items.optionsTelos: Feature 选择 B：完整质量收口。

userDecisions: 用户确认 auto 与 Option B
items.axisSplitSnapshot: 拆分原因：浏览器/静态质量证据与发布布局/CI 具有独立验收与失败根因；本 Step 先提供后者依赖的稳定命令。
items.temporaryArtifactLifecycle: not-applicable：Playwright 产物和 tarball 均由现有 ignore/cleanup 机制管理；不删除无关文件。

items.problemDefinition: 现有示例仅覆盖两个页面级场景，无法证明报告要求的组件、主题和视口矩阵。
items.requirementsDefinition: 新增稳定组件夹具、主题/视口 Playwright projects、a11y/截图断言、真实表格边界断言和静态 token 规则。
nonGoals: 不修改公共组件行为，除非新增测试暴露缺陷。

plainLanguage.unclear: 目前的绿灯只能证明示例页，而不能证明整个组件库目标态。
plainLanguage.why: 主题和响应式回归可能只在未覆盖组件或宽度出现。
plainLanguage.outcome: 让关键组件和阈值在两个主题、四种宽度下都有可重复失败信号。

options.name: 补充少量页面断言
options.risk: 仍遗漏主题或视口组合

options.name: Playwright projects 矩阵与共享夹具
options.cuttingPoint: 配置化主题/视口并复用断言

recommendedOption.rationale: 官方 Playwright projects 与 colorScheme 直接支持所需矩阵，且避免重复测试代码。

granularity.whySmallEnough: 共享不变量是质量矩阵和静态契约；消费者安装/CI 已拆到 S-SWQT-0008。
granularity.whyNotSplitFurther: fixture、projects、截图和 axe 必须共同提供一次浏览器验收信号。
granularity.splitSignals: 若组件缺陷要求改变公开 API 或 token 语义，则拆出独立修复 Step。

readiness.reason: 范围、现有夹具、依赖和验收都已明确；没有待定产品决策。

forwardImpact.resolution: 提供稳定的根级质量命令，供 CI 复用。

testDrivenDesign.testCaseDesign: 每个组件夹具在 light/dark 与四个视口运行真实浏览器、axe 和截图；DataTable 在 820/821px 验证 gate。
testDrivenDesign.acceptanceToTestMapping: 报告的组件矩阵、WCAG、视觉和 data-dense 验收分别映射到 projects、axe、toHaveScreenshot 与边界用例。
testDrivenDesign.riskToTestLevelMapping: 用户可见主题/响应式行为使用 browser E2E；token 契约使用静态脚本。
testDrivenDesign.regressionTestDesign: 新增每个缺口对应的回归断言。
testDrivenDesign.residualRisk: 第三方组件的全部内部状态仍需逐次扩展，但核心交互组件先覆盖。
testDrivenDesign.followUp: S-SWQT-0008 在 CI 与 tarball 布局中复用这些门禁。

items.profileNote: full：涉及用户可见运行时行为与发布质量承诺。

items.summary: Implemented an 8-project Playwright quality matrix (light/dark × compact/data-dense/lg/xl), representative public Table rendering, 820/821 boundary coverage, and expanded semantic-token static checks.
items.result: All commands passed; the normal browser run reported 18 passed and 6 viewport-scoped skips.

cases.name: Consumer verifies core components across supported render contexts
cases.evidence: Screenshot and axe checks run for every light/dark × compact/data-dense/lg/xl project.

cases.name: Data-dense table respects the 820px visibility boundary
cases.evidence: The actual public Table is hidden at 820px and visible at 821px, with axe checks at both widths.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Changes are confined to the example, browser matrix, static checker, and snapshots; status is implemented and the brief is complete.
typecheck, design contract, example build, snapshot update, and normal Playwright matrix passed; normal run: 18 passed, 6 intentional project-scoped skips.
Browser screenshot + axe coverage runs across light/dark × four viewports; a real public Table is asserted at 820/821px; static rules cover token definition/alias checks.

gateOutcomes.gate: provenance, document graph, and SSOT impact
gateOutcomes.evidence: sourceFeature is F-SWQT-0002; docs and CI change project facts, which S-SWQT-0008 owns and documents.
Current screenshots are project-scoped and stale two-file baselines were removed; stable paths and validation evidence were rechecked.

items.residualRisk: The matrix targets core components and representative interactions, not every third-party component state; future public component changes must add a focused fixture or assertion.
items.followUp: S-SWQT-0008 will enforce the matrix in CI and publish-shaped consumer layouts.

items.finalDocumentEntry: .sw/workflow/steps/S-SWQT-0007-组件质量矩阵与静态主题门禁.json
